notes:
The Samsung CLP-610 is a networked color laser printer with a 2008 street price of $330 USD. This printer is supported by the foo2qpdl open software printer driver.

Consumables/Refills: Toner Black (4000 prints) - $80 Toner Yellow (4000 prints) - $110 Toner Magenta (4000 prints) - $110 Toner Cyan (4000 prints) - $110 Transfer Belt (35000 prints) - $47 Part numbers: CLP-K600A, CLP-Y600A, CLP-M600A, CLP-C600A, CLP-T600A

drivers.name: pxlcolor-Samsung
drivers.comments:
This driver is available in the Ghostscript Printer Application

This driver is intended for Samsung PCL-XL color printers and MFP devices.
